name: docintell
description: Test orchestrator for the three DocIntel services. See docs/testing.md.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend,compute" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "cd backend && python run.py" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd compute && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:compute && npm run test:frontend
